zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Wyncoll於大約1495年出生在英國素福爾可可洛普頓時，他的父親John Wyncoll41歲，母親Alice Groom30歲。他和Thomasine Page至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1559年7月31日在英國英格蘭素福爾可蕾托 瓦爾迪費爾德享年65歲。

nameMeanings.name: Wyncoll
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name, toponymic from Winkhill (Lincs), or perhaps topographic from an unattested Middle English * winkel, derived from Old English * wincel ‘nook, corner, bend in a river’.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Wyncoll was born about 1495, in Clopton, Suffolk, England, his father, John Wyncoll, was 41 and his mother, Alice Groom, was 30. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Thomasine Page. He died on 31 July 1559, in Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Wyncoll est né environ 1495, à Clopton, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Wyncoll, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Alice Groom, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Thomasine Page. Il est décédé le 31 juillet 1559, à Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Wyncollが約1495年にイギリススフォルククロプトンで生まれた時，父John Wyncollは41歳，母Alice Groomは30歳であった。彼はThomasine Pageとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1559年7月31日にイギリスイギリススフォルクリットル ワルディングフィールドで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Wyncoll(이)가 대략 1495년 영국 수폴크 클로프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Wyncoll(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Groom(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Thomasine Page(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1559년 7월 31일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 리틀 월딩필드에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.
